entry.title: Her Majesty, Tamaneko - Xanrean Chronicles Book 1
entry.summary:
Tama is a ninja. She speaks in the third person, hates wearing clothes, and thinks her pet boar Jiggle is the best thing since burnt fish. She is also, apparently, the lost princess of a kingdom she's never heard of and the living avatar of the Goddess of Creation. She'd rather fight goblins.
Saki …
entry.content:
Tama is a ninja. She speaks in the third person, hates wearing clothes, and thinks her pet boar Jiggle is the best thing since burnt fish. She is also, apparently, the lost princess of a kingdom she's never heard of and the living avatar of the Goddess of Creation. She'd rather fight goblins. Saki is a Kitsune. She's spent her entire life manipulating everyone around her, hiding her true nature, and ignoring the voice in her head that whispers erase. She thought she was beyond caring about anyone. Then she met Tama. Together, an illiterate cat-girl and a traumatized fox-girl stumble through goblin armies, undead liches, ancient dragons, and the worst enemy of all: paperwork. Along the way, they'll collect a divine water spirit who wants to be a pet, an elf child who wants to be a weapon, and a princess who wants to be a slave. Oh, and the world is ending. Again. Her Majesty, Tamaneko is a progression fantasy about found family, the cost of strength, and learning that sometimes the person you needed was trying to find you too.

Platforms: Royal Road · Royal Road

entry.title: The Hero is Perfect
entry.summary:
A powerful figure, all might and all strength. | Enters the castle, just walks through the gate.
No monster too strong, no army too large. | To Hero it is just another weak foe.
He swings his mighty sword, all valiant with might. | And collects all his harem from all in his sight.
All women they …
entry.content:
A powerful figure, all might and all strength. | Enters the castle, just walks through the gate. No monster too strong, no army too large. | To Hero it is just another weak foe. He swings his mighty sword, all valiant with might. | And collects all his harem from all in his sight. All women they serve him, all men they adore, | and children to be him. They wish forevermore. The Hero is perfect. The Hero is grand. | The Hero is perfect. Don't you understand? The Hero is coming, the Hero is here! | The Hero was never late or on time. For time is a servant to Hero, oh mine! | And then the Hero rides on his horse, slays all the monsters and saves us with force. His Harem is mighty, his power so great, | that even the Princess obeys and is safe. This is the lullaby sung to the residents of the Toybox from the moment they are born. They live and breathe The Hero. He is perfect, he is kind, he is less a person and more a force of nature. There is just one tiny problem... "The Hero" has died countless times in the Toybox. He hates it, He hates them, He wants to escape more than anything. Except there is no escape. The Toybox runs on broken quests, worse incentives, and mechanics that should not exist. Then one day, during a random iteration like any other... One of the NPC's wake up... The Toybox will never be the same. She was written to serve, to adore, to worship. A perfect NPC in a perfect role. Never to awaken to the horrors of The Toybox. But she did... Now she's caught between what she was programmed to feel and what she actually feels. In a world built on broken mechanics, she might be the most broken of all. Warning! This story is dark, like, extremely dark. So dark your father probably would drink it like his coffee. It is also EXTREMELY sexual and objectifying of women, men, dogs, and the occasional landmine.

Platforms: Royal Road · Royal Road · Royal Road

entry.title: LUCAS THE GRAND STRATEGIST
entry.summary:
Lucas the Grand Strategist is the most feared adventurer in the kingdom.
He defeated an ancient dragon on his first day, cleared eighty goblins in a single afternoon, and dismantled an entire bandit operation without breaking a sweat.
None of that is true.
He tripped, panicked, and got lucky. Rep…
entry.content:
Lucas the Grand Strategist is the most feared adventurer in the kingdom. He defeated an ancient dragon on his first day, cleared eighty goblins in a single afternoon, and dismantled an entire bandit operation without breaking a sweat. None of that is true. He tripped, panicked, and got lucky. Repeatedly. The dragon died because he fell down. The goblins died because he ran in circles. The bandits died because he threw something out of spite and didn't know what it was. Unfortunately nobody believes him. Not the elf ranger who has decided she is on a grand romantic adventure with a tactical genius. Not the Nekojin who keeps showing up in his room at night, who he is absolutely certain is an assassin. Not the adventurers guild who keeps giving him quests he doesn't understand. And certainly not the Demon Queen, who will one day face him in single combat and lose in a way she will never be able to adequately explain. Lucas just wants to survive long enough to figure out why everyone in this world is trying to either kill him or marry him. He is not lucky enough for either.

Platforms: Royal Road · Royal Road · Royal Road

entry.title: The Godling and Her Husband
entry.summary:
My parents considered me an accident. But was useful as a tax write-off. Mommy served daddy and daddy beat her when she didn't listen. I was told that is how life was meant to be. That one day I would meet a man and I would be his perfect wife!
When I turned six, I started being able to see blue th…
entry.content:
My parents considered me an accident. But was useful as a tax write-off. Mommy served daddy and daddy beat her when she didn't listen. I was told that is how life was meant to be. That one day I would meet a man and I would be his perfect wife! When I turned six, I started being able to see blue things inside people. I could reach out and take them or change them to be better. When I took mommy's blue thing she fell down and stopped moving. I put it back and she got up. I realized when I did things to the blue thing, mommy started doing what I wanted. So I did the same to daddy, having mommy help me. Then I met Mark. I knew in an instant it was him, my perfect husband. There were a few.. small flaws. He was far too old, mommy told me that me being so young and him being that much older was wrong and people would be upset. I punished mommy for upsetting me. But she was right, she was mommy after all. So I did the only thing I could think of! I gave Mark my body! The nice policeman told mommy he died of a heart attack. but Mark was okay, he was with me! We were going to find him a new body that was even better then his old one and we would be married and I would be the perfect wife! At least... that was the plan. It's been fifteen years and Mark still hasn't chosen a body. He uses mine. Says its really cool because I can jump high and run fast and am almost invulnerable. Not very wifely things... Either way, my Husband always knows best!

Platforms: Royal Road
